tasks.name: Review project structure
tasks.description: Inspect the existing folder structure, frontend, backend, and setup files. Identify where the app can be organized better.

tasks.name: Document architecture
tasks.description: Summarize the app architecture, routes, and data flow in a simple way. Add notes about the PHP backend and frontend integration.

tasks.name: Find security issues
tasks.description: Look for common PHP and form security problems. Suggest fixes for input validation, sanitization, and authentication.
